title: Glen Canyon Park San Francisco - Back county experience
content: "Glen Canyon Park" San Francisco is my favorite place for a "back country" feel with no tourist bus in sight. It is only moments away from BART and Muni.

title: Glen Canyon Park Photos
content: It's an easy hike with mostly flat trails and lots of good views. It didn't feel like we were still in the city, so that was nice. I also saw a few people bring

title: Glen Canyon Park Loop, California
content: Glen Canyon Park Loop 4.7 ( 2,261 reviews ) 51% of reviewers say this trail is moderate. Not crowded Dog-friendly Cool hidden . Parking: Free, Medium lot

title: San Francisco's Glen Park and Glen Canyon: A Self ...
content: The tour was very interesting and informative, and the GPS-enabled audioguide worked perfectly. Would highly recommend this app (VoiceMaps)

title: Glen Canyon Park - All You SHOULD Know Before Going ...
content: This park is so beautiful! Nice place for children, a good playground. Besides a baseball field that people can seat or play ball or freebies. Also a nice hike.
